title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 172.743 - General traffic laws to apply to roads on university property
text:
172.743.  General traffic laws to apply to roads on university property. — All motor vehicles operated upon any thoroughfare owned or maintained by the state university and located within any of its campuses shall be subject to the provisions of the general motor vehicle laws of this state, including chapters 301, 302, 303, 304, 307 and 577.  Violations shall have the same effect as though such had occurred on public roads, streets or highways of this state.
(L. 1985 H.B. 288, et al. § 1)
